prompt:
Minimalist fashion editorial infographic, soft muted mauve/grey background, two stylish female models standing side by side centered, full body, confident poses, studio lighting, clean shadows, high-end fashion campaign look.
Left model: wearing a rust orange blouse with long sleeves tucked into dark brown tailored trousers, black pointed high heels, holding a structured handbag, minimal jewelry (earrings).
Right model: wearing a dark ribbed fitted top tucked into beige wide-leg pleated trousers, black wide-brim hat, hoop earrings, necklace, carrying a small handbag.
Around each model, neatly arranged outfit breakdown elements (floating items) with thin dotted connector lines pointing to the model:
Left side items: blouse, tailored trousers, handbag, heels, earrings
Right side items: hat, ribbed top, wide-leg pleated trousers, necklace, handbag, hoop earrings
Each item displayed as clean cut-out product shot, evenly spaced, symmetrical layout.
Typography: small elegant serif labels under each item (e.g., “blouse”, “tailored trousers”, “heels”), subtle and minimal.
Composition: balanced editorial layout, lots of negative space, premium magazine/catalog aesthetic, soft neutral tones, cohesive color palette.
Ultra-realistic, sharp focus, high resolution, fashion lookbook style, Pinterest/Instagram luxury brand vibe
